question.label: Billing rewrite clarity
question.name: What do you need to know about the billing rewrite to feel prepared for it?
question.description: Seeks clarity on Priya's expectations and needs regarding her involvement in the upcoming project.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: Mentoring interest was reiterated but clarity on billing rewrite remains unaddressed.

new_queue.label: Mentoring role
new_queue.name: What kind of mentoring opportunities are you envisioning for yourself now?

new_queue.label: Blockers insight
new_queue.name: What's currently blocking your progress on tasks that we haven't discussed yet?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
